list.label: Jira URL
list.name: jira_url
list.query: SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'jira_url'

list.label: Team / Project
list.name: project
list.query: SELECT key FROM projects ORDER BY key

list.label: Release
list.name: release
list.query: SELECT name FROM releases ORDER BY released DESC, release_date DESC NULLS LAST

panels.description: Total issues assigned to this release.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won')

panels.title: Total Issues in Release

panels.description: Count of bugs assigned to this release.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Bug' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won')

panels.title: Bugs in Release

panels.description: Average days from creation to resolution for resolved issues.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at)))::numeric, 1) AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won')

panels.title: Avg Days to Resolution

panels.description: Percentage of issues in release that have been resolved.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won')

panels.title: % Issues Resolved

panels.description: Issues per team broken down by issue type. Each series is one issue type.

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "Bug" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Bug' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "Story" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Story' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "Task" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Task' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "Improvement" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Improvement' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "Sub-task" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Sub-task' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

panels.title: Issues by Team (by Type)

panels.description: Bugs per team stacked by severity. Blocker = dark red, Critical = red, High = orange, Medium = yellow, Low = green.

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "Blocker" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Bug' AND i.priority = 'Blocker' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "Critical" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Bug' AND i.priority = 'Critical' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "High" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Bug' AND i.priority = 'High' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "Medium" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Bug' AND i.priority = 'Medium' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "Low" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Bug' AND i.priority = 'Low' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

panels.title: Bugs by Team (by Severity)

panels.description: Percentage of issues resolved per team.

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.project_key AS metric, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Resolution % by Team

panels.description: Average days to fix per team, grouped by priority. Shows how long each team takes to close issues at each severity level.

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.project_key AS metric, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at)))::numeric, 1) AS "Blocker" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.priority = 'Blocker' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at)))::numeric, 1) AS "Critical" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.priority = 'Critical' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at)))::numeric, 1) AS "High" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.priority = 'High' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at)))::numeric, 1) AS "Medium" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.priority = 'Medium' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at)))::numeric, 1) AS "Low" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.priority = 'Low' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

panels.title: Open Issues by Type (by Team)

panels.description: Average days to fix per issue type, one bar per team. Only counts resolved issues.

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.issue_type AS issue_type, i.project_key AS team, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at)))::numeric, 1) AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.issue_type, i.project_key ORDER BY i.issue_type, i.project_key

panels.description: Issues per priority stacked by team.

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "Blocker" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.priority = 'Blocker' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

panels.title: Issues by Priority (by Team)

panels.description: Unresolved issues per priority stacked by team — release risk view.

panels.description: Bugs per priority stacked by team.

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "Medium" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Bug' AND i.priority = 'Medium' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "Low" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Bug' AND i.priority = 'Low' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

panels.title: Bugs by Priority (by Team)

panels.description: Issues per status stacked by team.

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.status AS status, i.project_key AS team, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.status, i.project_key ORDER BY i.status, i.project_key

panels.title: Issues by Status (by Team)

panels.description: Bugs only grouped by status.

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.status AS status, i.project_key AS team, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Bug' AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.status, i.project_key ORDER BY i.status, i.project_key

panels.title: Bugs by Status (by Team)

panels.description: Top 10 components by total issue count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT c.component AS component, i.project_key AS team, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS value FROM issues i, unnest(i.components) AS c(component) WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.components IS NOT NULL AND array_length(i.components, 1) > 0 AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY c.component, i.project_key ORDER BY SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT i.key)) OVER (PARTITION BY c.component) DESC, c.component, i.project_key

panels.title: Issues by Component (by Team)

panels.description: Top 10 components by open issue count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT c.component AS component, i.project_key AS team, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS value FROM issues i, unnest(i.components) AS c(component) WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.resolved_at IS NULL AND i.components IS NOT NULL AND array_length(i.components, 1) > 0 AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY c.component, i.project_key ORDER BY SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT i.key)) OVER (PARTITION BY c.component) DESC, c.component, i.project_key

panels.title: Open Issues by Component (by Team)

panels.description: Top 10 components by bug count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT c.component AS component, i.project_key AS team, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS value FROM issues i, unnest(i.components) AS c(component) WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Bug' AND i.components IS NOT NULL AND array_length(i.components, 1) > 0 AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY c.component, i.project_key ORDER BY SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT i.key)) OVER (PARTITION BY c.component) DESC, c.component, i.project_key

panels.title: Bugs by Component (by Team)

panels.description: Top 10 assignees by open issue count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(i.assignee, 'Unassigned') AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.resolved_at IS NULL AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.assignee ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Open Issues by Assignee

panels.description: Top 10 assignees by total issue count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(i.assignee, 'Unassigned') AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.assignee ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Total Issues by Assignee

panels.description: Top 10 assignees by open bug count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(i.assignee, 'Unassigned') AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.issue_type = 'Bug' AND i.resolved_at IS NULL AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.assignee ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Open Bugs by Assignee

panels.description: All issues in release. Sortable by any column.

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.key AS "Key", i.summary AS "Summary", i.issue_type AS "Type", i.project_key AS "Team", COALESCE(array_to_string(i.components, ', '), '—') AS "Component", i.priority AS "Priority", i.status AS "Status", COALESCE(i.assignee, 'Unassigned') AS "Assignee", TO_CHAR(i.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Created", CASE WHEN i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(i.resolved_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE '—' END AS "Resolved", CASE WHEN i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(DAY FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at))::int ELSE NULL END AS "Days to Fix" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') ORDER BY i.created_at DESC

panels.title: All Issues in Release
Data Age
panels.description: Time since the most recent issue sync for this release.

targets.rawSql: SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(i.updated_at))) / 3600.0 AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won')

SELECT i.issue_type AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key)::int AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.issue_type ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT i.priority AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key)::int AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') GROUP BY i.priority ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT i.priority AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT i.key)::int AS value FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND i.issue_type = 'Bug' GROUP BY i.priority ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Avg Days to Resolution by Priority

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'Overall' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 1) AS "Blocker" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.priority = 'Blocker'

SELECT 'Overall' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 1) AS "Critical" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.priority = 'Critical'

SELECT 'Overall' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 1) AS "High" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.priority = 'High'

SELECT 'Overall' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 1) AS "Medium" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.priority = 'Medium'

SELECT 'Overall' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 1) AS "Low" FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.key IN (SELECT issue_key FROM issue_fix_version_history WHERE fix_version = '$release' AND removed_at IS NULL) AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.priority = 'Low'
